Event: The Supreme Sorcery Festival
Event Date: 01/08/2023
Sage Bot Item Code: SG11


Other locations the gear can be found
Red Dragon
Mystic Dragon
Defender Shaman Shotgun

On dealing 40000 damage, summons a turret that cannot be killed an deals 9800 damage per second. Every 40000 damage done by the turret's owner enhances done by the turret by 700 (stacks up to 5 times).
The turret is destroyed when its owner is killed.
**Turret:** Prefers to attack enemies with the lowest current health. Each attack deals 55000-125000 additional physical damage depending on the enemy fighter's health. The lower the health, the higher the damage.

Requirements: 98-100
